full_text:
The sample was small and bloody but hard.

Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 ml of media.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

4 vials of 4.65 E6 cells each were frozen.

Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 5.49
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.78
 | viability [%] | 32.5
 | size [µm] | 8.1
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 6.90
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.56
 | viability [%] | 22.6
 | size [µm] | 7.4
Average | [cells/ml] | 6.20 E6
 | total [cells] | 18.6 E6 in 3 ml
 | viability [%] | 37.55
